actions.value:
Purchasing cryptocurrency with a bank transfer via Wyre will take up to 5 business days to complete.


Note that you have locked in the price of your crypto at the time of your purchase.  The value of your purchase may have fluctuated due to market volatility, and your account will have a higher or lower value than you had initially purchased. 


You still have the same amount of crypto, but like any other investment market, prices change constantly.


Let us know if you have any further questions!
